record.field: Note: need to set request_id in the dict

request_id_by_model = { "res.partner": 0, "res.partner.title": 0, "res.partner.category": 0, "sale.order": 0, "sale.order.line": 0, "product.template": 0, "product.product": 0, "product.pricelist": 0, } raise_if_request_fail = False for item in payload: model = item.get("model") method = item.get("method") ids = item.get("ids") if method in ("create", "write"): domain = [("id", "in", ids)] if "active" in env[model]._fields: domain += ["|", ("active", "=", True), ("active", "=", False)] request_id = request_id_by_model.get(model) if not request_id: continue env["foreg.o2o.request"].browse(request_id).action_send_request( read_filter=domain, read_offset=0, read_limit=9999, raise_if_fail=raise_if_request_fail ) if method == "unlink": pass # TODO: handle unlink action
